description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a predominantly matte black and gray body, accented by electric blue-green highlights and stylized lightning patterns. The barrel is short and cylindrical, with a matching blue-green muzzle and a squared-off front end. The grip is ergonomically shaped, featuring a textured brown surface for improved handling, and is integrated into the lower rear of the frame. The top of the shotgun is flat and angular, with geometric paneling and subtle glowing lines that suggest a high-tech or sci-fi design. There is no visible stock, and the overall form is streamlined, lacking external attachments or complex mechanical features. The trigger area is enclosed by a squared, robust guard, and the weapon appears to be constructed primarily from metal and polymer materials.
description: A compact, futuristic shotgun with a matte black and gray body, blue-green highlights, and a textured brown grip. The design is angular and streamlined, with a short barrel and no visible stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the angular body, blue-green highlights, and the brown textured grip.
description_view_1: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the end of the barrel, with the blue-green muzzle and squared-off rear profile visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the grip texture and the stylized lightning pattern on the body.
description_view_3: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, blue-green muzzle, and the flat, squared front end of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, robust, medium-sized with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
